label: Structure layout
description: A layout that generates a fully-walled structure with doors, terrain, and optional exterior prefab scatter. Inherits from LayoutDef.

wallDef.label: Wall def
wallDef.description: ThingDef used for the structure's interior walls.

wallLampChancePerPosition.label: Wall lamp chance per position
wallLampChancePerPosition.description: Probability that each eligible wall position receives a lamp.

exteriorDoorDef.label: Exterior door def
exteriorDoorDef.description: ThingDef used for doors leading to the exterior.

exteriorDoorStuffDef.label: Exterior door stuff
exteriorDoorStuffDef.description: Material (ThingDef) used for exterior door construction.

terrainDef.label: Terrain def
terrainDef.description: TerrainDef placed as the default floor across the structure.

defaultAffordanceTerrainDef.label: Default affordance terrain
defaultAffordanceTerrainDef.description: TerrainDef used where the base terrain lacks required affordances for building placement.

importantRoomDef.label: Important room def
importantRoomDef.description: LayoutRoomDef that must always be included in the generated layout.

roomToExteriorDoorRatio.label: Room to exterior door ratio
roomToExteriorDoorRatio.description: Fraction of rooms that receive exterior-facing doors.

spawnDoors.label: Spawn doors
spawnDoors.description: Whether doors are placed in room openings during generation.

clearDoorFaction.label: Clear door faction
clearDoorFaction.description: Whether door faction ownership is cleared after placement.

canConnectRoomsExternally.label: Can connect rooms externally
canConnectRoomsExternally.description: Whether rooms can connect through exterior walls.

areaPrunePercent.label: Area prune percent
areaPrunePercent.description: Fraction of the generated area pruned away to create irregular layouts.

canDisconnectRooms.label: Can disconnect rooms
canDisconnectRooms.description: Whether rooms are allowed to become disconnected from the main layout.

ensureOneDoorUnlocked.label: Ensure one door unlocked
ensureOneDoorUnlocked.description: When true, at least one door in the structure is guaranteed to be unlocked.

corridorDef.label: Corridor def
corridorDef.description: LayoutRoomDef used for generated corridors connecting rooms.

corridorShapes.label: Corridor shapes
corridorShapes.description: Allowed corridor intersection shapes as flags. Defaults to All.

wallDamageRange.label: Wall damage range
wallDamageRange.description: Random HP damage range applied to walls after generation. IntRange.Invalid means no damage.

surroundingTerrainDef.label: Surrounding terrain def
surroundingTerrainDef.description: TerrainDef placed around the exterior of the structure.

surroundingScatterTerrainDef.label: Surrounding scatter terrain
surroundingScatterTerrainDef.description: TerrainDef scattered around the structure exterior.

surroundingScatterRange.label: Surrounding scatter range
surroundingScatterRange.description: Range in cells for how far surrounding scatter terrain extends from the structure.

scatteredPrefabs.label: Scattered prefabs
scatteredPrefabs.description: Groups of prefabs scattered around the structure exterior.
